column1:
- Understand the structure and execution flow of a basic Java program, including the role of the main() method and statement syntax.  
- Declare, initialize, and use variables to store and manipulate data values.  
- Use System.out.print and System.out.println to output text and variable values, including concatenating multiple items in one output statement.  
- Implement input operations using the Scanner class to read integer values from the keyboard.  
- Apply newline characters and output formatting techniques to control program output appearance.
